name: Exquisite Salad (Rice/chicken Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Green onions with tops, sliced
1 1/2 cups Asparagus, cooked al dente, cut & chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rice according to package directions.
2. In a blender, combine vinegar, oil, sugar, garlic, and cilantro. Blend until smooth. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
3. Combine rice, chicken, green onions, tomatoes, escarole, asparagus, and avocado in a large bowl.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad ingredients and toss gently to coat evenly.
5. Serve immediately or chill in the refrigerator to allow flavors to meld.
